raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/year>, I purchase concert tickets from XXXX and after credit card information was submitted they added charges. As soon as I realized, called the bank and ask them to block the payment which they refuse to do and instead asked me to start a dispute, which they have modified inexplicably. Since, we have called several times. Sent emails as well as physical letters by mail as instructed, talk over the phone, and they repeatedly send information saying that we have not sent the documentation requested. They have closed the disputes and provided no assistance.
